case_title: ROSENTHAL, DORI (OWNER) et al VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY ROSENTHAL, DORI (OWNER) LAMPHERE, MATT (DRIVER) AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAYPUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION BUREAU OF CLAIMS AND CONTRACTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-28-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAYPUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION BUREAU OF CLAIMS AND CONTRACTS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROSENTHAL, DORI (OWNER) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAYPUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION BUREAU OF CLAIMS AND CONTRACTS $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $515.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
